data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_ShowM:
I'm the GAME DESIGNER.\pOh, is that right?
You're working on a POKéDEX?\pIt's tough trying to complete it,
but don't give up.\pIf you do complete it, please come
show me.
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Fille:
Wow! That's awesome!
Yep, it's totally awesome!\pThis POKéDEX is completely filled!
You really must love POKéMON!\pI'm so impressed!\pLet me give you something in
recognition of your feat!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_ImThe: Me? You're talking to me?\nI'm the PROGRAMMER.\pI wonder what the SLOTS are\nlike here.
I'm the GRAPHIC ARTIST! Aren't the\nPOKéMON of HOENN interesting?
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Girls: The girl TUBERS, they're cute, hey?\nTo battle against a cute TUBER...\pWhoop, it drives me wild!\pAnd the TWINS! Aren't they cute?\nA 2-on-2 battle with TWINS...\pWhoop, it's unbearably fun!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_SeaBr: The sea breeze tickles my heart.\nIt feels wonderful here!
data/maps/LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F/.LilycoveCity_CoveLilyMotel_2F_Text_Never: You never know when and where\npeople will challenge you.\pThat's why I never leave home without\nmy GAME BOY ADVANCE.
